contactId.description: ONLY the Salesforce Contact Id (15 or 18 characters, starts with 003). Extract from explicit ID patterns or context when the user refers to a known contact record.

subject.description: Short summary of the IT issue for the case Subject. OPTIONAL — default applied if omitted.

description.description: Detailed symptoms, device/software, and steps tried. OPTIONAL.

priority.description: Use High for outage or urgent language; otherwise Medium or Low. OPTIONAL — defaults to Medium.
